relevant_past_solutions.relevance: E93-S02 documented stale closure bugs in Zustand stores (softDelete/restoreNote). The same pattern is present in NoteConflictDialog's handleUseOtherVersion which reads `note.conflictCopy` from a closed-over prop. The E93-S02 fix used functional set form for Zustand. NoteConflictDialog uses a prop-based approach which is safe for React re-render semantics but worth noting.

summary: Prior sync bugs (E93-S02) involved stale closures in Zustand stores. The current PR avoids Zustand closures in conflictResolvers (pure module) and uses React prop-based closure in the dialog component, which is safe per React semantics. No directly applicable past bugs found that would be triggered by this change.
